heading: Depot-level activities of the Department of Defense: authority to compete for maintenance and repair workloads of other Federal agencies
label: 2470 Depot-level activities of the Department of Defense: authority to compete for maintenance and repair workloads of other Federal agencies
text: A depot-level activity of the Department of Defense shall be eligible to compete for the performance of any depot-level maintenance and repair workload of a Federal agency for which competitive procedures are used to select the entity to perform the workload.
